title: State transition enforcement
notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, append audit ledgers, write audit events, create UI, or mutate product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S09 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.
Claude P3 finding S09-P3-01 was fixed by adding non-string and untrimmed state transition claim rejection tests.
Claude P3 finding S09-P3-02 was fixed by adding a runtime precheck output versus fixture precheck_result deepEqual.
Claude P3 finding S09-P3-03 was fixed by requiring all declared S09 required_acceptance_gates in the RP00 validator loop.

Claude P3 finding S09-P3-04 was adjudicated as informational: this subphase intentionally records a nominal synthetic metadata transition where the from-state is implied by a validated S08 allow_metadata_only result.

commands.summary: Final S09 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation
